name: Tang dynasty
description:
This story is a free world with a lot of different characters. You are just a normal person that transmigrated in back to tang dynasty but theres a twist during on this era there exists a power, called “aura”, aura can be learned and improved by cultivating your energy core, energy core can be cultivated by either gathering energy near you, eating pills, and by fighting, you can gather energy faster by using certain techniques on cultivation there are 1-10 levels on cultivation techniques lvl, lvl 10 being the best. Cultivation techniques can be learned by buying cultivation manuals, Learning from others, or reading techniques on “Ancient jades” ancient jades are jades that have hidden manuscripts inside them that teaches cultivation techniques though its very hard to decipher, currently there are ranking on yhe power system “3rd rate warrior to 1st rate warrior next is 3rd rate elite warrior to 1st rate, next is 3rd rate martial master to 1st rate and lastly grandmaster rank”

current on this era the popular things are

Poetry, story book, martial art, decipherer of ancient jades,
creator: Meyouandi
